sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ الْأَنْشِطَةُ الْبَدَنِيَّةُ الْمُنْتَظَمَةُ، مِثْلُ الْمَشْيِ السَّرِيعِ أَوِ السِّبَاحَةِ، مِنْ أَفْضَلِ الطُّرُقِ لِتَقْوِيَةِ عَضَلَةِ الْقَلْبِ.
sentences.translation: Redovne fizičke aktivnosti, poput brzog hodanja ili plivanja, smatraju se jednim od najboljih načina za jačanje srčanog mišića.
sentences.translationEn: Regular physical activities, such as brisk walking or swimming, are considered among the best ways to strengthen the heart muscle.

sentences.arabic: تَعْمَلُ هَذِهِ التَّمَارِينُ عَلَى تَحْسِينِ الدَّوْرَةِ الدَّمَوِيَّةِ وَخَفْضِ مُسْتَوَيَاتِ الْكُولِيسْتِرُولِ الضَّارِّ فِي الدَّمِ.
sentences.translation: Ove vježbe rade na poboljšanju cirkulacije krvi i snižavanju nivoa lošeg holesterola u krvi.
sentences.translationEn: These exercises work on improving blood circulation and lowering bad cholesterol levels in the blood.

sentences.arabic: وَمِنَ الْمُهِمِّ تَنْوِيعُ الرِّيَاضَاتِ لِتَشْمَلَ تَمَارِينَ الْمُقَاوَمَةِ الَّتِي تُحَافِظُ عَلَى كُتْلَةِ الْعَظَلَاتِ وَقُوَّةِ الْعِظَامِ.
sentences.translation: Važno je diverzifikovati sportove kako bi uključili vježbe otpora koje održavaju mišićnu masu i snagu kostiju.
sentences.translationEn: It is important to diversify sports to include resistance exercises that maintain muscle mass and bone strength.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَقْتَصِرُ فَوَائِدُ الرِّيَاضَةِ عَلَى الْجَانِبِ الْجَسَدِيِّ فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ تَمْتَدُّ لِتَشْمَلَ إِفْرَازَ هُرْمُونَاتِ السَّعَادَةِ.
sentences.translation: Prednosti sporta nisu ograničene samo na fizički aspekt, već se protežu i na lučenje hormona sreće.
sentences.translationEn: The benefits of sports are not limited to the physical aspect only, but also extend to include the release of happiness hormones.

sentences.arabic: بِذَلِكَ، يُصْبِحُ الِانْتِظَامُ فِي مُمَارَسَةِ الرِّيَاضَةِ اسْتِثْمَارًا طَوِيلَ الْأَمَدِ فِي صِحَّةِ الْفَرْدِ وَشَبَابِهِ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Time redovnost u vježbanju postaje dugoročna investicija u zdravlje pojedinca i njegovu trajnu mladost.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, regularity in exercising becomes a long-term investment in an individual's health and lasting youth.
